title: Would like to be able to change subitem terminology Choose another word instead of "subitem" that's relevant to your work
excerpt:
Would like to be able to change subitem terminology Choose another word instead of “subitem” that’s relevant to your work. 
Similar to how it works with items.

posts.author: JOliveira (Jen Oliveira)

posts.author: CReilly (Christina Reilly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, cast a vote for this feature here:
Edit Group & Subitem Terminology - Feature requests - monday Community Forum

If we keep all votes for this in a single item, it’ll help bump it to the top of the request list.
